positive: A stylized, abstract representation of a soaring phoenix rising from cosmic embers. The phoenix has sleek, geometric feathers rendered in deep indigo, vibrant gold, and burnt orange gradients. It is framed centrally against a dramatic, minimalist background of deep space and nebulae, allowing the silhouette and luminous edges of the bird to pop. High contrast, sharp vector art quality, woodcut print aesthetic combined with bioluminescent glow. The composition should be highly symmetrical, suitable for a repeating pattern or a single chest graphic. Inspired by Art Deco and celestial cartography. Dramatic directional lighting emphasizes the fiery glow against the dark void.
